description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs on the default runner image and installs sbt via apt in a before_script: apt-get update -y, apt-get install apt-transport-https -y, echo "deb http://dl.bintray.com/sbt/debian /" | tee -a /etc/apt/sources.list.d/sbt.list, apt-key adv --keyserver hkp://keyserver.ubuntu.com:80 --recv 642AC823, apt-get update -y, apt-get install sbt -y, sbt sbt-version. Define a single job named test in the default test stage that executes the script commands: sbt clean coverage test coverageReport. The pipeline does not define any stages, services, caches, artifacts, or conditional rules.
